---
title: "Side Missions"
---

Life is a choose-your-own-adventure game. This is a log of my journey, covering everything from the main missions of my professional work to the side quests that keep life interesting.

# Latest from Substack

<div id="rss-feed">Loading latest side quests...</div>

<script>
  const rssUrl = 'https://rohanranshinge.substack.com/feed';
  const apiUrl = `https://api.rss2json.com/v1/api.json?rss_url=${encodeURIComponent(rssUrl)}`;

  fetch(apiUrl)
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
      const container = document.getElementById('rss-feed');
      container.innerHTML = '';
      // This grabs your 5 most recent posts
      data.items.slice(0, 5).forEach(item => {
        // This strips HTML out of the summary for a clean preview
        const cleanSnippet = item.description.replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '').substring(0, 180);
        
        container.innerHTML += `
          <div style="margin-bottom: 25px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
            <h4 style="margin-bottom: 5px;"><a href="${item.link}" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;">${item.title}</a></h4>
            <p style="font-size: 0.85em; color: gray; margin-bottom: 8px;">${item.pubDate.split(' ')[0]}</p>
            <p style="margin-bottom: 0;">${cleanSnippet}...</p>
          </div>
        `;
      });
    })
    .catch(error => {
      document.getElementById('rss-feed').innerHTML = 'Error loading feed. <a href="https://rohanranshinge.substack.com">Visit my Substack directly</a>.';
    });
</script>

<br><br>

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-top: 20px;">
  <iframe 
    src="https://rohanranshinge.substack.com/embed" 
    width="480" 
    height="320" 
    style="border: 1px solid #EEE; background: transparent;" 
    frameborder="0" 
    scrolling="no">
  </iframe>
</div>
